release_notes: New traffic source and affiliate network templates. Added an 'Email' traffic source template for email marketers (pre-fills subscriber_id, campaign_id, list_id, broadcast_id, esp sub-parameters to map your ESP's merge tags). Added platform-level affiliate network templates — Everflow, CAKE, HitPath, Affise and TUNE/HasOffers — so any smaller network running on those platforms can be connected by picking the platform template, instead of needing a per-company entry. The offer sub-parameter for each platform is pre-filled with that platform's standard click-id field (Everflow sub1, CAKE s1, HitPath c1, Affise sub1, TUNE aff_sub).
